---
title: "Histine, carbohydrates/polysaccharides, and proteins with β -sheet conformation as promising staging markers for oral squamous cell carcinoma"
date: 2025-11-01
author:
  - name: Jimenez, Gabrielle
  - name: Foiani, Letícia
  - name: Figueiredo, Julia Toledo
  - name: Sá Alves, Mariana
  - name: Sá Rodrigues, Nayara
  - name: Bandeira, Celso Muller
  - name: Alves, Mônica Ghislaine Oliveira
  - name: Dias Almeida, Janete
  - name: Da Silva Martinho, Herculano
abstract: > 
  Resumo não disponível.
categories: [article]
citation: 
  container-title: "Spectrochimica Acta Part A: Molecular and Biomolecular Spectroscopy"
  volume: 340
  doi: "10.1016/j.saa.2025.126296"
---

```{=html}
<nav aria-label="breadcrumb">
  <ol class="breadcrumb">
    <li class="breadcrumb-item"><a href="../../index.html">Home</a></li>
    <li class="breadcrumb-item"><a href="../index.html">Publicações</a></li>
    <li class="breadcrumb-item active" aria-current="page">Histine, carbohydrates/polysaccharides, and proteins with β -sheet conformation as promising staging markers for oral squamous cell carcinoma</li>
  </ol>
</nav>
